sections.title: Hero Header Section
sections.description: Introduce the company with a strong headline, highlight the main value proposition, and include a CTA to learn more.

sections.title: Client Logos List
sections.description: Showcase prominent clients and partners to build credibility and trust.

sections.title: Feature Section
sections.description: Highlight the company's core expertise and competitive advantages.

sections.title: Features List Section
sections.description: Showcase up to 3 key services or product offerings with icons and short descriptions.

sections.title: Testimonial Section
sections.description: Display customer testimonials and success metrics from past engagements.

sections.title: CTA Section
sections.description: Encourage visitors to request a quote or schedule a consultation.

sections.title: Header Section
sections.description: Introduce the About page with a tagline that highlights the company's mission and vision.

sections.title: About Section
sections.description: Provide a brief history of the company, its founders, and core values.

sections.title: Team Section
sections.description: Showcase the key team members with their roles and brief bios.

sections.title: Header Section
sections.description: Introduce the Services page and outline the benefits of choosing our solutions.

sections.title: Services List Section
sections.description: Detail the main service offerings with scope, deliverables, and expected outcomes.

sections.title: Process Section
sections.description: Explain the step-by-step methodology the company follows from discovery to delivery.

sections.title: Header Section
sections.description: Welcome visitors to the company's work gallery and highlight key achievements.

sections.title: Projects Grid
sections.description: Filterable grid of completed projects, case studies, and client success stories.

sections.title: Header Section
sections.description: Encourage visitors to get in touch with the team.

sections.title: Contact Form Section
sections.description: Provide a form for visitors to submit inquiries, project details, and timelines.

sections.title: Locations Section
sections.description: Display the company's office location with an interactive map.
